title: Dentata
company: Jess Lazar (Funny or Die, Hulu) and co-birthed by SITI Company's Lucy Smith. Written and starring award-winning Julia VanderVeen, The Broad Street Review called it, “A rich expression of female ferocity: joyful and brave."
description: Julia VanderVeen - Performer/CreatorLucy Smith: Show DoulaJess Lazar: Director/Creative ConsultantEva Lansberry: Puppet DesignerMae Merkle: Puppet Designer MedusaScottie Rowell: Puppet supportHans Meyer: Sound DesignerJackson Sturkey: Original songSpecial thanks: Zach Fine, Hannah Mitchell, Dynamic El Dorado, Fly on a Wall, William VanderVeen
